_doc: Per-map AI difficulty data feeding meta.difficulty (see server/mapClassifier.js).
perRoundFrac = fraction of 6 AI bots that finish an observed round, from the
2026-06-11 headless autopilot sweep (51 maps x 8 seeds x 120s windows) in
Keys are map names with whitespace removed (the sweep's naming).
Tier cutoffs live in config.json -> difficultyRamp.tierCutoffs:
< midMax (0.35) -> mid | >= midMax -> easy (healthy band is 0.20-0.35).
aiArtifacts: maps whose sim score is an AI pathing artifact, NOT difficulty
(GoodLuck spawn-lava map issue, TheIsland AI-uncompletable gauntlet) - they
are excluded from sim-based inference and fall back to the geometry heuristic.
Regenerate with `node .github/scripts/measure-map-difficulty.js --write` (report-only without the flag) after AI behavior changes or bulk map additions.
